evidence: "This is a really well-done mystery, that immerses you in the time-period and story from the start."
"I liked the premise of the movie, and the actors were fine. But the story seemed to drag out a little."

"I enjoyed this movie more than I expected to... And only at the end, when the surface-level story-line had concluded, did I realize that my whole interpretation of that story was potentially incorrect."
"The story seemed to drag out a little."
"...the success of the show is not only due to the brilliant writing and production, but to the richness and integrity of the actors who bring it to life."
"I can't understand the low reviews some people gave this."
"I really like Ben Stiller, and he and the other actors were fine..."
"...it was a treat to watch a movie that emphasized the story-line first and foremost; I really enjoyed watching the story unfold."

summary: The user enjoys engaging dramas and mysteries, often appreciating well-developed characters and uplifting stories. They have a mixed preference for pacing and narrative complexity, indicating a balance between straightforward storytelling and deeper themes. Overall, they value emotional resonance and sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
